channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-18025] sanity-flr test_70: crash in lod_sub_get_thandle
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/faba15a1-29c7-47c0-95b0-2de89085dc62

test_70 failed with the following error:

onyx-113vm7 crashed during sanity-flr test_70

Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-master/4548 - 5.14.0-362.24.1.el9_3.x86_64
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-b2_12/164 - 3.10.0-1160.49.1.el7_lustre.x86_64

This started sometime in December 2023, first recorded crash: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/bf4bd5da-3039-4699-aabc-2dbf7e6a75b6

[22816.860932] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: == sanity-flr test 70: mirror create and split race ====== 08:19:35 (1720685975)
[22831.108890] general protection fault: 0000 [#1] SMP
[22831.115103] Modules linked in: dm_flakey osp(OE) mdd(OE) lod(OE) mdt(OE) lfsck(OE) mgs(OE) mgc(OE) osd_ldiskfs(OE) lquota(OE) fid(OE) fld(OE) ksocklnd(OE) ptlrpc(OE) obdclass(OE) lnet(OE) crc_t10dif crct10dif_generic ldiskfs(OE) libcfs(OE) dm_mod rpcsec_gss_krb5 auth_rpcgss nfsv4 dns_resolver nfs lockd grace fscache iosf_mbi crc32_pclmul ghash_clmulni_intel ppdev aesni_intel sunrpc lrw gf128mul glue_helper ablk_helper cryptd parport_pc pcspkr joydev parport virtio_balloon i2c_piix4 ip_tables ata_generic pata_acpi ext4 mbcache jbd2 ata_piix virtio_net net_failover virtio_blk failover libata crct10dif_pclmul crct10dif_common crc32c_intel floppy serio_raw virtio_pci virtio_ring virtio [last unloaded: dm_flakey]
[22831.129354] CPU: 0 PID: 6718 Comm: mdt00_001 Kdump: loaded Tainted: G           OE  ------------   3.10.0-1160.49.1.el7_lustre.x86_64 #1
[22831.131656] Hardware name: Red Hat KVM, BIOS 0.5.1 01/01/2011
[22831.132753] task: ffff9147d99ea100 ti: ffff9147d904c000 task.ti: ffff9147d904c000
[22831.134168] RIP: 0010:[<ffffffffc1018876>]  [<ffffffffc1018876>] lod_sub_get_thandle+0xc6/0x400 [lod]
[22831.136062] RSP: 0018:ffff9147d904f8f8  EFLAGS: 00010206
[22831.137080] RAX: 5a5a5a5a5a5a5a5a RBX: ffff9147d6788480 RCX: ffff9147d904f94f
[22831.138423] RDX: ffff9147ceabce00 RSI: ffff9147d6788480 RDI: ffff9147d27978c0
[22831.139772] RBP: ffff9147d904f938 R08: 0000000000000010 R09: 0000000000000003
[22831.141127] R10: 0000000000000006 R11: ffff9147db30aa00 R12: ffff9147d904f94f
[22831.142468] R13: ffff9147bc906000 R14: ffff9147da627230 R15: ffff9147d27978c0
[22831.143815] FS:  0000000000000000(0000) GS:ffff9147ffc00000(0000) knlGS:0000000000000000
[22831.145341] CS:  0010 DS: 0000 ES: 0000 CR0: 0000000080050033
[22831.146433] CR2: 00007fa019afb000 CR3: 00000000ba9d2000 CR4: 00000000001606f0
[22831.147801] Call Trace:
[22831.148312]  [<ffffffffc101a0d6>] lod_sub_declare_destroy+0x56/0x2d0 [lod]
[22831.149637]  [<ffffffffc0ff6cfd>] lod_obj_stripe_destroy_cb+0x8d/0xa0 [lod]
[22831.150977]  [<ffffffffc100375e>] lod_obj_for_each_stripe+0x11e/0x2d0 [lod]
[22831.152302]  [<ffffffffc100454f>] lod_declare_destroy+0x46f/0x600 [lod]
[22831.153568]  [<ffffffffc100551a>] ? lod_declare_attr_set+0xba/0x6b0 [lod]
[22831.154871]  [<ffffffffc0d0da2b>] ? osd_declare_ref_del+0x3b/0x130 [osd_ldiskfs]
[22831.156276]  [<ffffffffc0ff6c70>] ? lod_xattr_list+0x150/0x150 [lod]
[22831.157547]  [<ffffffffc106b911>] mdd_declare_finish_unlink+0x91/0x210 [mdd]
[22831.158913]  [<ffffffffc107b52f>] mdd_unlink+0x48f/0xaa0 [mdd]
[22831.160034]  [<ffffffffc107b0a0>] ? mdd_unlink_sanity_check+0x100/0x100 [mdd]
[22831.161511]  [<ffffffffc0efe470>] mdt_reint_unlink+0xdc0/0x1960 [mdt]
[22831.163011]  [<ffffffffc0810f4e>] ? lu_ucred+0x1e/0x30 [obdclass]
[22831.164183]  [<ffffffffc0eefe52>] ? ucred_set_audit_enabled.isra.15+0x22/0x60 [mdt]
[22831.165655]  [<ffffffffc0f02f23>] mdt_reint_rec+0x83/0x210 [mdt]
[22831.166815]  [<ffffffffc0ede413>] mdt_reint_internal+0x6e3/0xaf0 [mdt]
[22831.168069]  [<ffffffffc0ee9c07>] mdt_reint+0x67/0x140 [mdt]
[22831.169207]  [<ffffffffc0b3beea>] tgt_request_handle+0xada/0x1570 [ptlrpc]
[22831.170551]  [<ffffffffc05dd217>] ? libcfs_debug_msg+0x57/0x80 [libcfs]
[22831.171847]  [<ffffffffc0ae0bcb>] ptlrpc_server_handle_request+0x24b/0xab0 [ptlrpc]
[22831.173332]  [<ffffffffc0ae4534>] ptlrpc_main+0xb34/0x1470 [ptlrpc]
[22831.174571]  [<ffffffffc0ae3a00>] ? ptlrpc_register_service+0xf80/0xf80 [ptlrpc]
[22831.176036]  [<ffffffff96ac5e61>] kthread+0xd1/0xe0
[22831.176975]  [<ffffffff96ac5d90>] ? insert_kthread_work+0x40/0x40
[22831.178161]  [<ffffffff97195df7>] ret_from_fork_nospec_begin+0x21/0x21
[22831.179400]  [<ffffffff96ac5d90>] ? insert_kthread_work+0x40/0x40
[22831.180560] Code: 04 24 00 48 83 7b 08 00 0f 84 77 01 00 00 48 8b 53 18 44 0f b6 43 14 0f b6 42 14 41 83 e0 10 83 e0 ef 44 09 c0 88 42 14 49 8b 06 <f6> 40 1c 02 0f 85 90 01 00 00 48 85 c0 74 33 48 8b 10 48 b9 ff
[22831.186539] RIP  [<ffffffffc1018876>] lod_sub_get_thandle+0xc6/0x400 [lod]
[22831.187895]  RSP <ffff9147d904f8f8>

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
sanity-flr test_70 - onyx-113vm7 crashed during sanity-flr test_70

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.

comments.comment: I think I"ve seen this locally few times - it was a race between umount and regular processing.
